name: devops
description: DevOps pipeline and infrastructure: CI/CD ordering, container/image hygiene, Kubernetes resource limits and probes, deploy strategy with rollback, and secrets handling — a firing devops-practices skill, a /devops:review command, and a devops-engineer worker + devops-reviewer pair. Owns infra-layer observability wiring (defers in-code instrumentation to observability); defers local docker-compose dev environments to dev-env.
